title: Trigynaea duckei

taxonomy: Trigynaea duckei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple family. The Annonaceae family is part of the order Magnoliales, which is a group of flowering plants that were previously classified under the order Magnoliidae. The order Magnoliales is part of the clade Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants. Trigynaea duckei is specifically a member of the genus Trigynaea.
